code:
def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    macd = ta.trend.MACD(df['close'], window_slow=params['window_slow'], window_fast=params['window_fast'], window_sign=params['window_sign'])
    macd_line = macd.macd()
    macd_signal = macd.macd_signal()
    macd_diff = macd_line - macd_signal
    signals = np.where((macd_diff > 0) & (macd_diff.shift(1) < 0), 1, np.where((macd_diff < 0) & (macd_diff.shift(1) > 0), -1, 0))
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index).astype(int)
rationale: USD/CHF exhibits momentum divergence patterns where MACD line crossovers above/below the signal line indicate potential trend reversals.
